name: julia milreu
hero: I'm a Motion Designer who's been making things move since 2014. Advertising, SaaS, Mobile games, Global Events, Social Media, and everything in between.
about:
I'm a Senior Motion Designer with over a decade of experience bringing stories to life through motion.

Throughout my career, I've led creative teams and delivered high-impact visual campaigns for global brands in the mobile games and marketing industries — from growth-focused ads at Fanatee to full-scale event identities at App Growth Summit.

I hold a Bachelor's degree in Digital Animation Design and a specialization in UX Design, combining strong artistic foundations with user-centered thinking to craft meaningful and effective visual communication.

Beyond the screen, I'm passionate about crafting magical worlds — inspired by my love for fantasy and Dungeons & Dragons — and channel that same sense of wonder into every project I create.
